title: hymenasplenium oligosorum
intro: Hymenasplenium oligosorum, also known as the Hymenasplenium oligosorum fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Hymenasplenium oligosorum is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
